activities.title: Tapas at Barcelona Wine Bar
activities.description: Experience the high-energy, Mediterranean vibes of this bustling South End wine bar. It is a premier social baseline for sharing small plates and heavy pours on a lively patio.

activities.title: IPAs at Heist Brewery
activities.description: Head to this converted industrial space for award-winning IPAs and a full kitchen menu. It’s a staple for NoDa socialites who appreciate a gritty but polished brewery experience.

activities.title: Gas Station Social at 1501 South Mint
activities.description: Lounge at this converted 1930s gas station that has become a premier social hub for the city’s diverse and queer communities. The outdoor patio is the place to be for Sunday Funday or a high-vibe evening.

activities.title: Fusion Bites at The Cowfish
activities.description: Brave the crowds for the legendary 'Burgushi' in a vibrant, high-energy atmosphere that has been a city staple for over a decade. It is a loud, fun, and adventurous culinary crossroads.
activities.location: The Cowfish Sushi Burger Bar, SouthPark

activities.title: Literary Walk at The Green
activities.description: Wander through this whimsical, 1.5-acre urban park dedicated to literature, featuring sculptures and water features. It is a serene but culturally rich baseline for an afternoon stroll through Uptown.

activities.title: Patio Tacos at RuRu's Tacos & Tequila
activities.description: Mingle on one of the city's most beautiful historic patios with a margarita in hand. This Myers Park favorite is a high-visibility social hub for the young professional and creative crowd.

activities.title: Bikes & BBQ at Mac's Speed Shop
activities.description: Lean into the gritty, high-energy vibe of this South End institution known for its massive patio and extensive beer list. It is a quintessential social crossroads for bikers, locals, and visitors.

activities.title: Light Rail Brews at Triple C
activities.description: Sip award-winning beers in this sprawling South End warehouse featuring a high-energy taproom and outdoor space. It is a foundational social spot for the neighborhood’s craft beer enthusiasts.
activities.location: Triple C Brewing Co, South End

activities.title: Belgian Brews at Sugar Creek
activities.description: Explore Belgian-inspired ales in a massive, nautical-themed brewery within the LoSo district. Its social energy and adventurous beer styles make it an essential staple of the local craft scene.

activities.title: Kombucha & Pints at Lenny Boy
activities.description: Visit this diverse taproom known for its organic kombucha, traditional beers, and high-energy social events. It’s an inclusive, wellness-adjacent social baseline for the South End community.
activities.location: Lenny Boy Brewing Co, South End

activities.title: Nature Escape at USNWC
activities.description: Hike the extensive trail system along the river to reset your mental state away from the urban bustle. The natural terrain offers a rugged adventure that showcases the city's access to true wilderness.

activities.title: Market Exploration at Optimist Hall
activities.description: Navigate this massive, transformed textile mill for an early-morning bite from local artisan vendors. It is a sensory-heavy market experience that perfectly showcases the city's culinary and cultural diversity.

activities.title: Morning Run at Freedom Park
activities.description: Jog around the lake at Charlotte's signature urban park before the workday starts. It’s the foundational fitness baseline for the local community, offering scenic views and a highly social atmosphere.

activities.title: Vietnamese Soul at LangVan
activities.description: Experience legendary hospitality at a city staple beloved by the queer community for decades. This essential culinary baseline features a massive menu where the owner treats every regular like family.

activities.title: Art Immersion at Mint Museum Uptown
activities.description: Explore world-class craft, design, and contemporary art in a sleek, architectural gem. It is a sophisticated baseline for an artsy afternoon in the heart of Charlotte's cultural district.

activities.title: Pints at Olde Mecklenburg Brewery
activities.description: Visit the OG Charlotte biergarten for an authentic German-style experience in LoSo. Its massive outdoor space is the city's premier social anchor for weekend brews and bratwurst.

activities.title: Historic Steaks at Beef 'N Bottle
activities.description: Step back in time at this legendary, low-lit steakhouse that has maintained its classic mid-century charm since 1958. It is a foundational, unpretentious piece of Charlotte’s culinary soul.

activities.title: South End Rail Trail Social
activities.description: Walk the three-mile urban vein that defines modern Charlotte social life. It is the city's premier high-visibility corridor for a social stroll, offering endless people-watching and spontaneous entries into local bars.
activities.location: South End Rail Trail, South End

activities.title: Alternative Vibes at Snug Harbor
activities.description: Dive into the heart of Plaza Midwood's underground scene with live music that skews toward the adventurous and authentic. This nautical-themed sanctuary is where the city’s alternative socialites gather for high-energy sets.

activities.title: Cocktail Chemistry at Supperland
activities.description: Visit the speakeasy-style bar hidden within this restored mid-century church for adventurous, alchemical cocktails. The high-design setting and sophisticated crowd make it the peak of Charlotte’s social scene.

activities.title: NoDa Art Crawl
activities.description: Explore galleries and studios in NoDa during their monthly art crawl. Many artists are present, and some offer free snacks and drinks. A great way to experience local art and mingle.

activities.title: Run Club with Legion Brewing
activities.description: Join the weekly run club starting and ending at Legion Brewing. All paces welcome for a casual 3-mile loop. Stick around afterward for discounted beers and good company.

activities.title: Open Mic Comedy Night
activities.description: Laughs are on the house at this popular open mic night. Sign up to perform or just enjoy the local talent. Expect a mix of seasoned comics and brave newcomers.

activities.title: Community Yoga in the Park
activities.description: A free, all-levels yoga class held outdoors. Bring your mat and water bottle. A perfect way to unwind and connect with nature and community.

activities.title: Pop-Up Market at Camp North End
activities.description: Discover local artisans, vintage finds, and unique crafts at this rotating pop-up market. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere and explore the diverse vendors.

activities.title: Live Jazz at The Spoke Easy
activities.description: Enjoy a relaxed evening with live jazz music. This bike shop/bar offers a unique ambiance and a great selection of local brews. No cover charge.

activities.title: Queer Book Club Meeting
activities.description: Join a lively discussion of this month's queer-themed book. New members are always welcome to share their perspectives and connect with fellow readers.

activities.title: Plaza Midwood Art & Market
activities.description: Stroll through Plaza Midwood and discover local artists, crafters, and food vendors. Enjoy live street performances and the vibrant neighborhood atmosphere.

activities.title: Free Fitness Class at Optimist Hall
activities.description: Join a complimentary fitness class, often rotating between yoga, HIIT, or dance. A great way to get active and then grab a bite from the food stalls.

activities.title: Board Game Night
activities.description: Gather with friends or meet new people for a casual board game night. A wide selection of games is available, or bring your own.

activities.title: Live Music on the Patio
activities.description: Enjoy acoustic live music on the spacious patio of this popular brewery. Relax with friends and soak in the evening air.

activities.title: Gallery Reception: Emerging Artists
activities.description: Attend the opening reception for a new exhibition featuring emerging local artists. Mingle with artists, enjoy complimentary refreshments, and be among the first to see new works.
activities.location: Elder Gallery of Contemporary Art, South End

activities.title: Community Garden Volunteer Day
activities.description: Give back to the community by helping out at a local urban garden. Learn about sustainable practices and connect with nature. All skill levels welcome.

activities.title: Improv Comedy Showcase
activities.description: Catch a free improv comedy showcase featuring local troupes. Expect spontaneous humor and audience interaction.

activities.title: Drag Bingo with Patti O'Furniture
activities.description: Get ready for a fabulous night of bingo hosted by Charlotte's drag legend, Patti O'Furniture. Expect hilarious commentary, great prizes, and a lively crowd. Tickets include bingo cards.

activities.title: Trivia Night at Protagonist LoSo
activities.description: Test your knowledge at one of Charlotte's most popular trivia nights. Gather your team for a chance to win prizes and enjoy craft beers. Entry fee per team.

activities.title: Charlotte Knights Baseball Game
activities.description: Catch a Charlotte Knights minor league baseball game. Enjoy America's favorite pastime with great views of the city skyline. Tickets are affordable and perfect for a casual evening out.

activities.title: Indie Film Screening + Q&A
activities.description: Experience an independent film screening followed by a Q&A session with the director. A chance to engage with emerging filmmakers and discover new cinematic voices.

activities.title: Pottery Painting Workshop
activities.description: Unleash your creativity at this beginner-friendly pottery painting workshop. Choose from various pieces and design your own masterpiece. Price includes materials and firing.

activities.title: Live Music: Local Indie Band
activities.description: Enjoy a night of live music featuring a popular local indie band. Great atmosphere, good drinks, and a chance to support Charlotte's music scene.

activities.title: Axe Throwing Session
activities.description: Try your hand at axe throwing in a safe and fun environment. Instructors will guide you through the basics. Perfect for a unique and adventurous outing with friends.
activities.location: Axe Club of America, South End

activities.title: Drag Race Watch Party
activities.description: Join fellow fans for a lively RuPaul's Drag Race watch party. Enjoy themed cocktails, commentary, and a fantastic atmosphere. Often includes mini-drag performances during commercial breaks.

activities.title: Charlotte FC Watch Party
activities.description: Cheer on Charlotte FC with fellow fans at this official watch party. Enjoy food and drink specials while watching the game on big screens.

activities.title: Brewery Tour & Tasting
activities.description: Take a guided tour of a local brewery and learn about the brewing process. The tour concludes with a tasting flight of their signature beers.

activities.title: Live Music: Acoustic Set
activities.description: Enjoy an intimate acoustic performance by a talented local musician. Perfect for a relaxed evening with good company and craft cocktails.

activities.title: Speed Dating (LGBTQ+ Edition)
activities.description: A fun and low-pressure way to meet new people in the LGBTQ+ community. Enjoy a series of short, structured dates. Pre-registration required.

activities.title: Wine Tasting & Pairing
activities.description: Explore a selection of wines with expert guidance, learning about different varietals and food pairings. A sophisticated and educational evening.

activities.title: Roller Derby Practice Viewing
activities.description: Watch the Charlotte Roller Girls practice their skills in an intense and exciting session. Get a glimpse into the world of roller derby.

activities.title: Charlotte Knights vs. Nashville Sounds (Day Game)
activities.description: Catch the Charlotte Knights in action against the Nashville Sounds for an afternoon baseball game. This 'Education Day' game is perfect for a relaxed outing, offering affordable fun at Truist Field. Enjoy the atmosphere of minor league baseball in Uptown.

activities.title: Charlotte 49ers Baseball vs. Campbell Fighting Camels
activities.description: Head to Hayes Stadium to support the Charlotte 49ers baseball team as they take on the Campbell Fighting Camels. It's '2 for $2 Tuesdays' with $2 hot dogs, making it a budget-friendly way to enjoy collegiate sports.
activities.location: Robert and Mariam Hayes Stadium, University City

activities.title: Mindless Minutia Trivia
activities.description: Test your general knowledge at Mindless Minutia Trivia. Gather your friends for a fun and competitive evening of questions and answers at Rhino Market's SouthPark location. Prizes often include gift cards or bragging rights.

activities.title: Weekly Trivia at Hi-Wire Brewing
activities.description: Join Hi-Wire Brewing for their popular weekly trivia night. Enjoy craft beers while competing with your team for prizes. It's a lively and engaging way to spend your Tuesday evening in the South End.

activities.title: Pub Trivia at Petty Thieves Brewing Co.
activities.description: Petty Thieves Brewing Co. hosts a classic pub trivia night. Grab a pint of their unique brews and challenge your brain with a variety of categories. A great spot for a casual and entertaining night out.

activities.title: Ramona and The Holy Smokes with Rebecca Porter
activities.description: Experience an intimate evening of live music at The Evening Muse, featuring Ramona and The Holy Smokes with opener Rebecca Porter. This NoDa staple is known for showcasing emerging and established indie artists.

activities.title: Topsail Steamer Boil & Brews
activities.description: Indulge in a delicious seafood boil paired with craft brews at The Chamber by Wooden Robot. This pop-up event offers a taste of the coast right in Charlotte, perfect for a unique culinary experience.
activities.location: The Chamber by Wooden Robot, NoDa

activities.title: Charlotte Knights vs. Nashville Sound (Evening Game)
activities.description: Return to Truist Field for an evening game as the Charlotte Knights continue their series against the Nashville Sounds. Tonight is 'Bark in the Ballpark,' so bring your furry friends for free entry and enjoy complimentary caricatures.

activities.title: Mindless Minutia Trivia at The Local
activities.description: Join The Local Charlotte for their popular Mindless Minutia Trivia. It's a fantastic opportunity to test your knowledge, enjoy some drinks, and compete for prizes in a relaxed neighborhood bar setting.

activities.title: Heated Rivalry Themed Trivia Night
activities.description: Hockey fans and book lovers, unite! Wooden Robot Brewery in South End hosts a 'Heated Rivalry' themed trivia night, focusing on the popular hockey book series. Partnering with Trope Bookshop, expect special prizes and books for sale.

activities.title: Run Club at Hi-Wire Brewing
activities.description: Lace up your shoes for the weekly Run Club at Hi-Wire Brewing. Enjoy a refreshing run through the South End neighborhood, followed by discounted beers and good company at the taproom. A great way to stay active and social.

activities.title: Concrete Boys: It's Us - Vol. 2 Tour
activities.description: Catch the Concrete Boys on their 'It's Us - Vol. 2 Tour' at The Underground. This is a chance to see a rising act in the hip-hop scene in one of Charlotte's premier live music venues.

activities.title: FALCO & BOOK PLAY JERRY GARCIA
activities.description: Experience a night dedicated to the music of Jerry Garcia with FALCO & BOOK at the Neighborhood Theatre Tap Room. Enjoy classic Grateful Dead tunes and other jams in a cozy, intimate setting.

activities.title: HOPS & HEELS :: FREE DRAG SHOW ::: Benefitting RAIN
activities.description: Enjoy a fabulous and free drag show, 'HOPS & HEELS,' at Pilot Brewing, with proceeds benefiting RAIN. Expect dazzling performances and a lively atmosphere, all for a great cause.

activities.title: Stereophonic at Knight Theater
activities.description: Catch the acclaimed play 'Stereophonic' at the Knight Theater. This production, set in a '70s recording studio with original music by Will Butler of Arcade Fire, offers a deep dive into the world of an up-and-coming rock band. A must-see for theater and music lovers.

activities.title: Galantis at Trio Charlotte
activities.description: Dance the night away with Swedish electronic music duo Galantis at Trio Charlotte. Known for their high-energy sets and infectious hits, this is a prime opportunity to experience top-tier EDM in a vibrant club setting.

activities.title: ACC Women's Lacrosse Championship Quarterfinals
activities.description: Witness top-tier collegiate lacrosse as the ACC Women's Lacrosse Championship kicks off its quarterfinals at American Legion Memorial Stadium. Eight nationally ranked teams will compete in a series of high-stakes games throughout the day.

activities.title: House of Funk
activities.description: Immerse yourself in an evening of soulful and energetic jazz with 'House of Funk' at Middle C Jazz. This intimate venue provides a perfect setting to enjoy live music from talented artists.

activities.title: Jason Salmon at The Comedy Zone
activities.description: Laugh out loud with comedian Jason Salmon performing live at The Comedy Zone. Known for his sharp wit and engaging storytelling, Salmon promises a night of top-notch stand-up comedy.

activities.title: The Gaming Lounge Video Gaming Pop-Up
activities.description: Dive into a night of retro and modern video games at The Gaming Lounge Pop-Up at Divine Barrel Brewing. Challenge your friends, enjoy craft beers, and relive classic gaming moments in a lively brewery setting.

activities.title: 420 "Get GAZZed" Infused Edibles Vendor Market + Party
activities.description: Explore a unique vendor market and party celebrating 420 culture at Gazz Godz Dispensary. Expect a variety of infused edibles, local vendors, and a festive atmosphere. This event offers a distinct experience for those interested in cannabis culture.

activities.title: Earth Day with CATS: Free Public Transit
activities.description: Celebrate Earth Day by taking advantage of complimentary public transit across all CATS modes. It's a great opportunity to explore Charlotte sustainably and reduce your carbon footprint.

activities.title: The Battery Show South 2026
activities.description: Attend The Battery Show South, a major industry expo at the Charlotte Convention Center. Explore cutting-edge technologies in battery, EV, and energy storage, and network with industry leaders. A unique event for those interested in future tech.

activities.title: Edging concert at The Milestone Club
activities.description: Catch the band Edging live at the legendary Milestone Club. Known for its raw energy and independent music scene, The Milestone offers an authentic rock experience for those looking for something off the beaten path.
